title: Distributed Governance — Computational Experiments
description: Satellite computational-experiments workspace of the distributed governance research program: adversarial and behavioral agent-based models stress-testing, calibrating, and extending the Core v0 public-resource allocation architecture. Companion to the working paper (doi:10.5281/zenodo.21228492). Includes the adversarial architecture-comparison engine, the behavioral adoption model, the planning-vector construction program, the longitudinal pipeline engine (budget-release policy, verification throughput, AI triage, adaptive adversaries), LLM-elicited calibration panels with provenance, pre-registered designs with public prediction accounting, cross-framework docking, figures with accessible descriptions, and one-command reproduction.
